headline: Fox (FOX) Loses 25% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why a Trend Reversal May be Around the Corner
summary: Fox (FOX) has become technically an oversold stock now, which implies exhaustion of the heavy selling pressure on it. This, combined with strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher, indicates a potential trend reversal for the stock in the near term.

headline: FOXA Stock Plunges To 52-Week Low: BofA Thinks It May Stay In ‘Deal Limbo’ Even With A World Cup Catalyst
summary: According to a report from Investing.com, BofA Securities reiterated an ‘Underperform’ rating on the stock with a $54 price target.
